summary: Resolve addresses via Blacklane's own public GraphQL (graphql.blacklane.com/public locationsAutocomplete+locationsGeocode), falling back to OpenStreetMap.
reason: Blacklane-native resolution returns the placeId + airportIata that /prices uses for accurate fares, which OSM geocoding cannot provide.
validated_outcome: quote 'JFK Airport' resolves to Blacklane's canonical place + placeId; prices match the web.
